title: Campfire Hopper
description: A datapack that implements the ability to make campfires be able to be used with hoppers.
body:
# Overview
This datapack allows hoppers to interact directly with campfires, enabling the automation of campfires. Simply place a hopper above and below the campfire and you'll be able to automate it.
## Note
- This only works with hoppers, not chests yet.
- It can only cook the recipes of a campfire. It can't smelt ores or other furnace recipes.
- It will ignore any hoppers facing from the side of the campfire, only up and bottom.

# Resourcepack
The resourcepack is optional since it only changes the item itself and not how the block looks and functions.

# Recipe
Combine a campfire and a hopper on a crafting table at any order.

![Campfire Hopper Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1626a6333041b471794cd4750e9d8de9cd8086e3.png)

# Planned Features
- Make chests and double chests be able to work with the campfire hopper.
- Make hoppers work from the sides.
- Make a configs command to configure how fast the campfire can cook.
- Make a configs command to configure whether it can cook all smeltable items.
